equipment_manual_index.label: Equipment manual index
equipment_manual_index.next_step: Add structured entries for tester, thermal chamber, and auxiliary hardware manuals.
equipment_manual_index.description: Structured index of tester, chamber, and auxiliary equipment manuals used during planning and preflight QA.

method_handbook_source_index.label: Method handbook source index
method_handbook_source_index.next_step: Keep the core planning handbook chapters aligned with the structured method registry and add summary notes for every supported chapter.
method_handbook_source_index.description: Structured source index for the core battery test-planning handbook chapters that act as the primary protocol reference.

method_handbook_evidence_cards.label: Method handbook evidence cards
method_handbook_evidence_cards.next_step: Add step-level evidence coverage and deviation rules for every supported standard method.
method_handbook_evidence_cards.description: Handbook-derived evidence cards that make the core planning reference executable for the agent at step level.

literature_source_index.label: Literature source index
literature_source_index.next_step: Add one source record for each paper, thesis, or manual before splitting it into reusable evidence cards.
literature_source_index.description: Bibliographic source index for ingested literature, including IEEE-style references, links, and summary file paths.

provisional_cell_assets.label: Provisional cell assets
provisional_cell_assets.next_step: Create temporary cell records for new user-supplied datasheet PDFs, review them, and promote only approved records into manual_cell_assets.json.
provisional_cell_assets.description: Temporary, user-supplied cell records extracted from new datasheets before review and formal promotion into the governed manual cell asset surface.

data_adapter_registry.label: Cycler data adapter registry
data_adapter_registry.next_step: Add deterministic adapter definitions for the export formats your lab uses first.
data_adapter_registry.description: Deterministic adapter definitions that map device exports into one canonical internal schema.

data_quality_rule_registry.label: Data quality rule registry
data_quality_rule_registry.next_step: Capture fail, warning, and review rules for missing columns, units, monotonic time, and pulse segmentation.
data_quality_rule_registry.description: Rule pack for automatic data QA after adapter normalization and before KPI extraction.

metric_definition_registry.label: Metric definition registry
metric_definition_registry.next_step: Define KPI formulas and required fields for cycle life, HPPC, SOC-OCV, and rate capability analyses.
metric_definition_registry.description: Controlled metric definitions used by deterministic analysis code and report generation.

report_template_registry.label: Report template registry
report_template_registry.next_step: Add the first structured report templates your lab actually ships or reviews.
report_template_registry.description: Structured report templates that convert protocol and analysis outputs into standard deliverables.

doe_template_registry.label: DOE template registry
doe_template_registry.next_step: Add screening, robustness, and optimization DOE templates plus factor libraries and constraints.
doe_template_registry.description: Structured DOE reference assets for experimental design suggestions and planning support.

ecm_model_registry.label: ECM modeling registry
ecm_model_registry.next_step: Define the ECM families, fitting inputs, and deliverables you want to support before rebuilding modeling tools.
ecm_model_registry.description: Starter registry for lightweight ECM modeling and parameter-identification workflows.

literature_evidence_cards.label: Literature evidence cards
literature_evidence_cards.next_step: Summarize papers into reusable evidence cards instead of relying on raw PDFs alone.
literature_evidence_cards.description: Paper-derived evidence cards for method comparisons, DOE references, and cell-specific test precedents.
